name: Thai Ramen Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Fresh ramen noodles (bamee), cut in half or 1 package broken in half
1/4 cup Lean pork, sliced into bite-sized pieces
1/4 cup Black fungus (cloud ear) soaked in water until soft
3/4 cup Red or yellow onions, thinly sliced and separated
1/4 cup (or to taste) Chilies, pounded coarsely
Romaine lettuce leaves, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a rapid boil in a large pot.
2. Place the noodles in a colander or strainer and lower them into the boiling water. Parboil until the noodles become somewhat clear (until soft for instant ramen). Drain and rinse briefly with water. Fluff the noodles with a fork and set aside to drain some more.
3. Heat the water again and cook the shrimps, pork, and cloud ears in the same way as the noodles. Drain well.
4. Combine all ingredients except the lettuce in a large bowl. Stir until well mixed.
5. Place the lettuce on a serving platter or plate.
6. Spoon the salad onto the lettuce and serve immediately. Makes about
